---
title: "alternative-protein-merge"
author: "Gabby Bui"
date: "2026-02-22"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
proceeded <- read_csv("https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/sdd5sq80l0rv002os6v1w/All_Companies_Database.csv?rlkey=chodjs7k4aw5d0pxrs42j05xt&st=nu1stpv5&dl=1")
head(proceeded)
```

```{r}
deals <- read_csv("https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/7y9n8e8yuldtu3y8abyou/Alternative-Protein-Deal.csv?rlkey=2v74j4len6mxgl71he9l0a4f1&st=c6azike2&dl=1")
head(deals)
```

```{r}
company_ids <- deals %>%
  select(CompanyName, CompanyID) %>%
  distinct(CompanyName, .keep_all = TRUE)

merged <- proceeded %>%
  left_join(company_ids, by = c("Company" = "CompanyName"))
```

```{r}
head(merged)
```
```{r}
write_csv(merged, "all_companies_merged.csv")
```
